prompt: make all LEDs blink at the same time, also I want the LEDs to be in a startfish shape

content.text: Let me get the current board state to work with the existing component IDs.
I'll reposition the LEDs + resistors into a starfish shape (top, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left, top-left arms radiating from a center) and simplify the sketch to all-blink simultaneously.
Now fix the wires to match the new positions:
Now fix the GND wires to match resistor positions:
Now update the sketch to blink all LEDs simultaneously:

Done! Here's what changed:

### ⭐ Starfish Shape
The 5 LEDs are now arranged like a starfish radiating from a center point:
```
        [Top]         col 4, row 0
  [Top-Left]  [Top-Right]   cols 1 & 7, row 4
  [Bot-Left]  [Bot-Right]   cols 2 & 6, row 10
```
Symmetrical star shape — 2 arms up, 2 arms mid-spread, 1 arm top-center.

### 💡 Sketch
All 5 LEDs now blink **together in sync** — 500ms ON, 500ms OFF, repeating forever. No more ripple or twinkle patterns.
